body: private static final String VALID_CHARS = "(\\\\.)|[^\\s" + SPECIAL_CHARS + "]";
private static final String WORD = "((" + VALID_CHARS + "|')+|" + QUOTED_USER + ")";
private static final String USER_REGEX = "^" + WORD + "(\\." + WORD + ")*$";
